docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING JOINT MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT TO JUDGMENT

NOTICE OF MOTION AND JOINT MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMMER, RUSSELL HEARING SET FOR DEC-30-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMMER'S JOINT MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 9, 2012 TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE KAHN. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-09-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-30-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION AND JOINT MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2011 Continued To Mar-09-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion To Approve And Enter Proposition 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory M. Sheffer, Esq., from Chanler Group, 415-388-0911, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion To Approve And Enter Proposition 65 Settlement is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the applicable requirements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
